prompt: Create a highly detailed anime-style illustration of a cute teenage twin-tailed girl sitting on a pink plaid bed in a cozy sunlit bedroom. She has extremely long silvery blue hair in twin tails tied with small pink ribbons, soft pale skin, slim proportions, and a bashful seated pose with one knee raised and the other leg folded to the side. Place a large opaque square censor block over the center of her face, colored as a muted gray-to-peach gradient, hiding all facial features. Her outfit consists of exactly 6 visible clothing/accessory pieces: an oversized pale blue T-shirt with a simple pink bunny graphic, a loose pink zip-up jacket slipping off her shoulders, a short dark pink plaid skirt, white slouchy socks, small blue dangling earrings, and pink hair ribbons. The bedroom is warm and feminine: pink plaid bedding, a pink heart-shaped cushion on the left, a white bunny plush on the right, and exactly 3 small objects on the bed in the foreground: a black smartphone, a tiny pink keychain charm, and a pink compact pouch with a strap. The room has a large open window on the left with sheer white curtains and intense morning sunlight streaming in, creating lens flare, sparkling dust motes, bright rim lighting, and soft overexposed highlights on hair and fabric. In the background show wooden wall trim and a headboard shelf with framed pictures, plus exactly 5 wall decorations: one round clock near the top center, one large ornate framed landscape painting on the upper right, one small floral frame near the clock, one small square character picture below the painting, and one tiny framed picture resting near the headboard. Use a polished GPT-image anime illustration look with crisp linework, glossy highlights, delicate fabric folds, pastel pink and blue color palette, high detail, romantic bedroom atmosphere, and vertical 3:4 composition. Avoid text, watermark, extra characters, or additional foreground items.
